query:
SELECT dt.d_year, 
       item.i_category_id, 
       item.i_category, 
       sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) 
FROM dfs.`tmp/date_dim.parquet` dt, 
     dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales, 
     dfs.`tmp/item.parquet` AS item 
WHERE dt.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk 
  AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
  AND item.i_manager_id = 1 
  AND dt.d_moy=11 
  AND dt.d_year=2000 
GROUP BY dt.d_year, 
         item.i_category_id, 
         item.i_category 
ORDER BY sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) DESC,dt.d_year, 
                                      item.i_category_id, 
                                      item.i_category 
LIMIT 100
